# neon_anonymized_branch (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a Neon anonymized branch.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "neon_anonymized_branch" "example" {
  project_id = "your-project-id"
  id         = "your-branch-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The branch ID.
- `project_id` (String) The project ID.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `masking_rules` (Block List) List of masking rules applied to the branch. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--masking_rules))
- `name` (String) The branch name.
- `parent_id` (String) The parent branch ID.
- `state` (String) The current state of the anonymized branch (e.g., created, initialized, anonymizing, anonymized, error).
- `updated_at` (String) The last update timestamp.

<a id="nestedblock--masking_rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `masking_rules`

Read-Only:

- `column_name` (String) The name of the column to be masked.
- `database_name` (String) The name of the database containing the table to be masked.
- `masking_function` (String) The PostgreSQL Anonymizer masking function applied.
- `masking_value` (String) A literal value set on the column when masking.
- `schema_name` (String) The name of the schema containing the table to be masked.
- `table_name` (String) The name of the table containing the column to be masked.
